description:
A connection between two parameters or a parameter and a modulation source. These objects are supposed to be used in the scripting engine and contain NO task whatsoever.
TODO: Make a hover info box that shows the connection update ratesearch the common containerget the process specs of the container

getSourceNode.description: Returns the source node. If getSignalSource is true, it searches the node that creates the modulation signal.

getTarget.description: Returns the target parameter of this connection.

getUpdateRate.description: Returns the update rate for the modulation connection.

isConnected.description: Checks if the connection is still valid.
